summary: This is a very brief link post where Joel Spolsky points readers to a podcast interview he did with CIO Magazine's Technology Editor Christopher Lindquist. The interview covers three topics: Asterisk (the open-source phone system), Ajax (the web development technique), and 'Astronauts' (likely referring to Joel's concept of 'architecture astronauts'). There is no substantive content in the post itself beyond the link.
key_points: Joel was interviewed by CIO Magazine's Technology Editor about three tech topics
The topics — Asterisk, Ajax, and Architecture Astronauts — were recurring interests in Joel's writing during this period
The post is essentially a pointer to external content with no analysis or argument of its own
key_insight: This is a brief link post directing readers to an external podcast interview, containing no substantive argument or analysis.
